message:
test(opt): add comprehensive minimizer and root-finder test suites with proptest

Expand test coverage for BFGS, CG(PR+), Powell, brentq, bisect, brenth,
and ridder with 40+ new tests across minimize.rs and root.rs:

Minimizers:
- BFGS: Rosenbrock convergence, nonconvex surfaces, zero-gradient start,
  flat functions, NaN gradient rejection in hardened mode, callback
  intermediate points, gradient tolerance early stopping
- CG: quadratic convergence, Rosenbrock reduction, high-dimensional,
  nonconvex handling, zero-function trivial convergence
- Powell: quadratic exact minimum, nonsmooth best-effort, 1D path,
  constant function termination
- Dispatch/integration: invalid gradient epsilon rejection, evaluation
  budget exceeded mapping

Root-finders:
- brentq: bracket endpoint roots, missing sign change rejection,
  discontinuous functions, tight/wide bracket convergence
- brenth: cross-method agreement with brentq
- bisect: tolerance convergence, max iterations budget
- ridder: cubic root finding
- Dispatch: missing bracket/inputs error reporting, hardened/strict
  mode non-finite rejection

Add proptest property-based tests (500 cases each) for optimizer
monotonicity, BFGS Hessian inverse symmetry, CG first-iteration descent,
and root-finder residual bounds. Introduce structured JSON test logging
infrastructure with TestLogEntry for all test runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,3 +7,6 @@ edition = "2024"
 fsci-runtime.workspace = true
 serde.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+proptest.workspace = true
